case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION vs. TURNER, DEBORAH D et al

docket_entries.description: #1 JDG WICK. CSR BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK G. VAN HEST. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFAULT FILED AS TO DEFT LISA MOORE. A JUDGMENT PURS TO STIP READ INTO THE RECORD AND SIGNED IN OPEN COURT BY DEFT, DEBORAH TURNER. PLTF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURNER, DEBORAH D MOORE, LISA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 460 ELLIS STREET, #41, S.F., STAYED UNTIL AUG-31-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT ALSO AGAINST LISA MOORE. SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $320.00 SHALL BE PERMANENTLY RETAINED BY PLTF. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
